name: G.M. Breweries Limited
summary: G.M. Breweries Limited engages in manufacturing and marketing of alcoholic liquor in India. Its alcoholic beverages include Indian made foreign liquor and country liquor. The company offers its products under the G.M.SANTRA, G.M.DOCTOR, G.M.LIMBU PUNCH, and G.M.DILBAHAR SOUNF brand names. G.M. Breweries Limited was founded in 1981 and is based in Mumbai, India.
